differential_diagnoses: Common variable immunodeficiency (CVID) with associated enteropathy
Monoclonal B-cell lymphoproliferative disorder / indolent lymphoma
next_steps: Surgical resection of the involved jejunal segments for definitive pathology
Full-thickness biopsy for immunohistochemistry and molecular analysis (T-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies)
Repeat flow cytometry and bone marrow biopsy to further characterize the abnormal NK-cell population
Evaluation for occult gastrointestinal blood loss despite negative CT angiography
Consultation with Hematology/Oncology and Gastroenterology to coordinate surgical planning and systemic therapy evaluation
